    2026-03-10 13:36:36 2026-03-10 13:44:06 0h 7m 30s+44ms
    TC_002_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    13:36:37 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'
    13:36:47 And I login as 'aman_opt' with password 'aman_opt'
    13:36:52 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:36:55 When I click on 'QuotationCardDashboard'
    13:36:55 And Verify 'QuotationsTitle' equals 'Quotations' text
    13:36:58 And I click on 'SPWaziriyahMrorrCard'
    13:36:59 And I click on 'NewQuotationButton'
    13:37:00 And I click on 'MotorCard'
    13:37:01 And I click on 'MotorPrivateCard'
    13:37:06 And I click on 'ComprehensiveCard'
    13:37:06 And Verify 'QutClassOfBusinessDisplay' equals '1 - Motor Private' text
    13:37:06 And Verify 'QutPolicyTypeDisplay' equals '1 - Comprehensive' text
    13:37:07 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    13:37:07 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text
    13:37:07 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    13:37:07 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    13:37:07 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    13:37:07 And Verify 'ErrorAlert' is enable
    13:37:07 And Verify 'QutSourceErrorMsg' contains 'Source must have some value.' text
    13:37:08 And Verify 'QutInsStDateErrorMsg' contains 'Effective Date must have some value.' text
    13:37:08 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateErrorMsg' contains 'Expiry Date must have some value.' text
    13:37:08 And I scroll to top of page
    13:37:08 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    13:37:08 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    13:37:08 And Verify 'QutCalculationBasisErrorMsg' contains 'Calculation Basis must have some value.' text
    13:37:08 And Verify 'QutCrCdErrorMsg' contains 'Currency must have some value.' text
    13:37:09 And Verify 'QutQuotNoCreateText' input is empty
    13:37:09 And I click on 'MainTab'
    13:37:09 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    13:37:10 And Select '1-Direct' value from 'QutSourceCombobox' dropdown list
    13:37:10 And Verify 'QutPaymentTermCombobox' contains '2-Account' text
    13:37:10 And Verify 'QutQuotDate' value equals sysdate
    13:37:10 And Verify 'QutQuotValidityDate' value equals sysdate plus '1' months minus '1' day
    13:37:10 And Set 'QutInsStDateInput' value to 'sysdateformatted'
    13:37:15 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:37:16 And I click on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    13:37:16 And I press Enter on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    13:37:22 And I wait for '6' sec
    13:37:22 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateInput' value equals sysdate plus '1' years minus one day

    13:37:22 And Set 'QutAwardedToInput' value to 'random5'

    13:37:28 And Verify 'QutUnitPriceVal' equals '1' text

    2026-03-10 13:44:06 2026-03-10 13:54:16 0h 10m 9s+412ms
    TC_002_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    13:44:07 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'
    13:44:17 And I login as 'aman_opt' with password 'aman_opt'
    13:44:22 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:44:24 When I click on 'QuotationCardDashboard'
    13:44:24 And Verify 'QuotationsTitle' equals 'Quotations' text
    13:44:26 And I click on 'SPWaziriyahMrorrCard'
    13:44:28 And I click on 'NewQuotationButton'
    13:44:41 And I click on 'MotorCard'
    13:44:42 And I click on 'MotorPrivateCard'
    13:44:49 And I click on 'ComprehensiveCard'
    13:44:50 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    13:44:50 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text
    13:44:50 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    13:44:50 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    13:44:51 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    13:44:51 And Verify 'ErrorAlert' is enable
    13:44:51 And Verify 'QutSourceErrorMsg' contains 'Source must have some value.' text
    13:44:51 And Verify 'QutInsStDateErrorMsg' contains 'Effective Date must have some value.' text
    13:44:52 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateErrorMsg' contains 'Expiry Date must have some value.' text
    13:44:52 And I scroll to top of page
    13:44:52 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    13:44:52 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    13:44:53 And Verify 'QutCalculationBasisErrorMsg' contains 'Calculation Basis must have some value.' text
    13:44:53 And Verify 'QutCrCdErrorMsg' contains 'Currency must have some value.' text
    13:44:53 And Verify 'QutQuotNoCreateText' input is empty
    13:44:54 And I click on 'MainTab'
    13:44:54 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    13:44:55 And Select '1-Direct' value from 'QutSourceCombobox' dropdown list
    13:44:55 And Verify 'QutPaymentTermCombobox' contains '2-Account' text
    13:44:56 And Verify 'QutQuotDate' value equals sysdate
    13:44:56 And Verify 'QutQuotValidityDate' value equals sysdate plus '1' months minus '1' day
    13:44:56 And Set 'QutInsStDateInput' value to 'sysdateformatted'
    13:45:01 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:45:02 And I click on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    13:45:02 And I press Enter on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    13:45:07 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:45:07 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateInput' value equals sysdate plus '1' years minus one day
    13:45:08 And I click on 'MotorInformationTab'
    13:45:08 And Verify tab 'MotorInformationTab' is selected
    13:45:08 And Set 'QutAwardedToInput' value to 'random5'
    13:45:09 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    13:45:09 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    13:45:10 And Select '1 - Pro Rata' value from 'QutCalculationBasisCombobox' dropdown list
    13:45:12 And Select '2 - US Dollars' value from 'QutCrCdCombobox' dropdown list
    13:45:15 And I wait for '3' sec
    13:45:18 And Verify 'QutUnitPriceVal' equals '3.75' text
    13:45:19 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    13:45:20 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    13:45:27 And I wait for '7' sec
    13:45:27 And I scroll to 'SuccessfullyAlert'
    13:45:27 And Verify 'SuccessfullyAlert' contains 'Data Saved Successfully.' text
    13:45:27 And I get text from 'QutQuotNoCreateText' and save it as 'QuotationNo'
    13:45:28 And I click on 'NextButton'
    13:45:33 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:45:33 And I click on 'RiskButton'
    13:45:35 And I switch to iframe 'MotorRiskIframe'
    13:45:38 And I wait for '3' sec
    13:45:38 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    13:45:38 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    13:45:39 And Verify 'QurVehicleMakeErrorMsg' contains 'Vehicle Make must have some value.' text
    13:45:39 And Verify 'QurVehicleModelErrorMsg' contains 'Vehicle Model must have some value.' text
    13:45:40 And Verify 'QurChassisNoErrorMsg' contains 'Chassis No must have some value.' text
    13:45:40 And Verify 'QurRegistrationNoErrorMsg' contains 'Registration No must have some value.' text
    13:45:40 And Verify 'QurTypeOfBodyErrorMsg' contains 'Type Of Body must have some value.' text
    13:45:41 And Verify 'QurVehicleColorErrorMsg' contains 'Vehicle Color must have some value.' text
    13:45:41 And I click on 'QurVehicleMakeCombobox'
    13:45:41 And I switch back to main content
    13:45:43 And Select '1 - komatsu' value from 'PopupLOVSearchBar' dropdown list
    13:45:43 And I switch to iframe 'MotorRiskIframe'
    13:45:44 And I click on 'QurVehicleModelCombobox'
    13:45:44 And I switch back to main content

    13:45:46 And I switch to iframe 'MotorRiskIframe'
    13:45:47 And Set 'QurChassisNoInput' value to 'nanotime'
    13:45:48 And Set 'QurRegistrationNoInput' value to 'nanotime'
    13:45:49 And I click on 'QurTypeOfBodyCombobox'
    13:45:49 And I switch back to main content

    13:46:01 And Verify 'SuccessfullyAlert' contains 'Row created.' text
    13:46:02 And I click on 'VehicleDetailsButton'

    13:46:05 And Verify 'VehiclePremiumDetailsDDL' contains 'TP' text
    13:46:19 And I fill IG 'F1_ig' with random values (combo/date/number) and save
    13:46:23 And I wait for '3' sec
    13:46:51 And I fill IG 'F2_ig' with random values (combo/date/number) and save

  • TC3S1 Apex Test Case Motor - Motor Private - Third Party (Saudi Riyals) pass
    2026-03-10 13:54:19 2026-03-10 14:00:24 0h 6m 5s+58ms
    TC_003_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    13:54:21 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'
    13:54:31 And I login as 'aman_opt' with password 'aman_opt'
    13:54:36 And I wait for '5' sec
    13:54:39 When I click on 'QuotationCardDashboard'
    13:54:39 And Verify 'QuotationsTitle' equals 'Quotations' text
    13:54:42 And I click on 'SPWaziriyahMrorrCard'
    13:54:44 And I click on 'NewQuotationButton'
    13:54:45 And I click on 'MotorCard'
    13:54:47 And I click on 'MotorPrivateCard'
    13:54:53 And I click on 'ThirdPartyCard'
    13:54:53 And Verify 'QutClassOfBusinessDisplay' equals '1 - Motor Private' text
    13:54:53 And Verify 'QutPolicyTypeDisplay' equals '2 - Third Party' text
    13:54:54 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    13:54:54 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text
    13:54:54 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    13:54:55 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    13:54:55 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    13:54:55 And Verify 'ErrorAlert' is enable
    13:54:56 And Verify 'QutSourceErrorMsg' contains 'Source must have some value.' text
    13:54:56 And Verify 'QutInsStDateErrorMsg' contains 'Effective Date must have some value.' text
    13:54:56 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateErrorMsg' contains 'Expiry Date must have some value.' text
    13:54:56 And I scroll to top of page
    13:54:57 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    13:54:58 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    13:54:58 And Verify 'QutCalculationBasisErrorMsg' contains 'Calculation Basis must have some value.' text
    13:54:58 And Verify 'QutCrCdErrorMsg' contains 'Currency must have some value.' text
    13:54:59 And Verify 'QutQuotNoCreateText' input is empty
    13:54:59 And I click on 'MainTab'

    2026-03-10 14:00:24 2026-03-10 14:07:38 0h 7m 14s+137ms
    TC_003_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    14:00:25 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'

    14:07:28 And I wait for '5' sec
    14:07:28 And Verify text of 'StatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '4 - Cancelled'
    14:07:29 And Verify text of 'ValidityStatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '2 - Invalid'
    14:07:29 And Verify text of 'QutQuotNoAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    14:07:36 And I wait for '7' sec
    14:07:37 Then I click on 'UserDDL'
    14:07:38 And I click on 'LogoutButton'
    14:07:38 And Verify 'loginButton' is present

    14:08:20 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text

    14:16:58 Then I click on 'UserDDL'

    14:17:02 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'
    14:17:12 And I login as 'aman_opt' with password 'aman_opt'

    14:17:29 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    14:17:29 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text

    2026-03-10 14:24:53 2026-03-10 14:27:24 0h 2m 31s+643ms
    TC_006_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    14:24:54 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'
    14:25:03 And I login as 'aman_opt' with password 'aman_opt'
    14:25:08 And I wait for '5' sec
    14:25:10 When I click on 'QuotationCardDashboard'
    14:25:10 And Verify 'QuotationsTitle' equals 'Quotations' text
    14:25:12 And I click on 'SPWaziriyahMrorrCard'
    14:25:13 And I click on 'NewQuotationButton'
    14:25:14 And I click on 'MarineCard'
    14:25:15 And I click on 'MarineCargoCard'
    14:25:20 And I click on 'CargoPolicyCard'
    14:25:20 And Verify 'QutClassOfBusinessDisplay' equals '10 - Marine Cargo' text
    14:25:20 And Verify 'QutPolicyTypeDisplay' equals '10 - Cargo Policy' text
    14:25:20 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    14:25:20 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text
    14:25:20 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    14:25:21 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    14:25:21 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    14:25:21 And Verify 'ErrorAlert' is enable
    14:25:21 And Verify 'QutSourceErrorMsg' contains 'Source must have some value.' text
    14:25:21 And Verify 'QutInsStDateErrorMsg' contains 'Effective Date must have some value.' text
    14:25:21 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateErrorMsg' contains 'Expiry Date must have some value.' text
    14:25:21 And I scroll to top of page
    14:25:21 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    14:25:22 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    14:25:22 And Verify 'QutCalculationBasisErrorMsg' contains 'Calculation Basis must have some value.' text
    14:25:22 And Verify 'QutCrCdErrorMsg' contains 'Currency must have some value.' text
    14:25:22 And Verify 'QutQuotNoCreateText' input is empty
    14:25:22 And I click on 'MainTab'
    14:25:22 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    14:25:23 And Select '1-Direct' value from 'QutSourceCombobox' dropdown list
    14:25:23 And Verify 'QutPaymentTermCombobox' contains '2-Account' text
    14:25:23 And Verify 'QutQuotDate' value equals sysdate
    14:25:23 And Verify 'QutQuotValidityDate' value equals sysdate plus '1' months minus '1' day
    14:25:23 And Set 'QutInsStDateInput' value to 'sysdateformatted'

    14:25:29 And I click on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    14:25:29 And I press Enter on 'QutInsStDateInput'

    14:25:35 And Select '1 - Saudi Riyals' value from 'QutCrCdCombobox' dropdown list

    14:25:39 And Verify 'QutUnitPriceVal' equals '1' text
    14:25:39 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    14:25:39 And I click on 'CreateButton'

    TC_007_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    14:30:00 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'

    14:30:29 And Verify 'QutPolicyTypeDisplay' equals '11 - Open Cover' text

    14:45:38 And I wait for '5' sec
    14:45:38 And Verify text of 'QutQuotNoAllQuotationDetails' contains saved value 'QuotationNo'
    14:45:39 And Select '2 - Cheque' value from 'QutCollectionTypeCombobox' dropdown list
    14:45:39 And I scroll to 'CustomerInfoButton'
    14:45:39 And I click on 'CustomerInfoButton'

    14:46:00 And Set 'CoversSerialRow' value to '1'

    14:46:01 And I switch back to main content

    14:46:03 And I click on 'CoversComboboxRow'
    14:46:03 And I switch back to main content

    14:46:10 And I switch back to main content

    14:46:11 And I click on 'REIPlanSaveButton'

    14:46:11 And Verify 'ReiMethodErrorMsg' contains 'REI Method must have some value.' text

    14:46:11 And I switch back to main content

    14:46:12 And I scroll to 'DeleteButton'
    14:46:12 And I click on 'DeleteButton'

    14:46:18 And I press Enter on 'SearchQuotationInput'

    14:46:25 And I reload page
    14:46:27 And I click on 'EditQuotationImg'

    14:46:33 And Verify text of 'QutQuotNoAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value 'statemanager:QuotationNo'

    14:46:40 Then I click on 'UserDDL'
    14:46:41 And I click on 'LogoutButton'

  • TC10S1 Apex Test Case Marine - Marine Hull - Liability (Saudi Riyals) pass
    2026-03-10 14:46:42 2026-03-10 14:49:53 0h 3m 10s+879ms
    TC_010_Apex
    Status Timestamp Details
    14:46:43 Given I navigate to 'http://hq-opt-ins-21:9090/ordsapexqa/r/qaapex/aman/login'
    14:46:53 And I login as 'aman_opt' with password 'aman_opt'
    14:46:58 And I wait for '5' sec
    14:47:01 When I click on 'QuotationCardDashboard'
    14:47:02 And Verify 'QuotationsTitle' equals 'Quotations' text
    14:47:04 And I click on 'SPWaziriyahMrorrCard'
    14:47:05 And I click on 'NewQuotationButton'
    14:47:06 And I click on 'MarineCard'
    14:47:09 And I click on 'MarineHullCard'
    14:47:12 And I click on 'LiabilityCard'
    14:47:12 And Verify 'QutClassOfBusinessDisplay' equals '11 - Marine Hull' text
    14:47:12 And Verify 'QutPolicyTypeDisplay' equals '16 - Liability' text
    14:47:13 And Verify 'QutStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Draft' text
    14:47:13 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text
    14:47:13 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    14:47:13 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    14:47:13 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    14:47:14 And Verify 'ErrorAlert' is enable
    14:47:14 And Verify 'QutSourceErrorMsg' contains 'Source must have some value.' text
    14:47:14 And Verify 'QutInsStDateErrorMsg' contains 'Effective Date must have some value.' text
    14:47:14 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateErrorMsg' contains 'Expiry Date must have some value.' text
    14:47:14 And I scroll to top of page
    14:47:14 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    14:47:15 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    14:47:15 And Verify 'QutCalculationBasisErrorMsg' contains 'Calculation Basis must have some value.' text
    14:47:15 And Verify 'QutCrCdErrorMsg' contains 'Currency must have some value.' text
    14:47:15 And Verify 'QutQuotNoCreateText' input is empty
    14:47:15 And I click on 'MainTab'
    14:47:15 And Verify tab 'MainTab' is selected
    14:47:16 And Select '1-Direct' value from 'QutSourceCombobox' dropdown list
    14:47:16 And Verify 'QutPaymentTermCombobox' contains '2-Account' text
    14:47:16 And Verify 'QutQuotDate' value equals sysdate
    14:47:16 And Verify 'QutQuotValidityDate' value equals sysdate plus '0' months plus '30' day
    14:47:17 And Set 'QutInsStDateInput' value to 'sysdateformatted'
    14:47:22 And I wait for '5' sec
    14:47:22 And I click on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    14:47:22 And I press Enter on 'QutInsStDateInput'
    14:47:27 And I wait for '5' sec
    14:47:27 And Verify 'QutInsEdDateInput' value equals sysdate
    14:47:27 And I click on 'CalculationsTab'
    14:47:28 And Verify tab 'CalculationsTab' is selected
    14:47:28 And Select '1 - Pro Rata' value from 'QutCalculationBasisCombobox' dropdown list
    14:47:29 And Select '1 - Saudi Riyals' value from 'QutCrCdCombobox' dropdown list
    14:47:32 And I wait for '3' sec
    14:47:32 And Verify 'QutUnitPriceVal' equals '1' text
    14:47:33 And I scroll to 'CreateButton'
    14:47:33 And I click on 'CreateButton'
    14:47:38 And I wait for '5' sec
    14:47:38 And I scroll to 'SuccessfullyAlert'
    14:47:38 And Verify 'SuccessfullyAlert' contains 'Data Saved Successfully.' text
    14:47:38 And I get text from 'QutQuotNoCreateText' and save it as 'QuotationNo'
    14:47:39 And I click on 'NextButton'
    14:47:44 And I wait for '5' sec
    14:47:44 And I click on 'AddNewRiskButton'
    14:47:45 And I switch to iframe 'AddNewRiskIframe'
    14:47:45 And I click on 'RiskTypeLiabilityCombobox'
    14:47:45 And I switch back to main content
    14:47:46 And Select '1 - Warehouse' value from 'PopupLOVSearchBar' dropdown list
    14:47:46 And I switch to iframe 'AddNewRiskIframe'
    14:47:46 And Select '1 - Risk Basis' value from 'BreakdownCombobox' dropdown list
    14:47:47 And I click on 'ApplyChangesButtonIframe'
    14:47:47 And I switch back to main content
    14:47:52 And I wait for '5' sec
    14:47:52 And I click on 'NextButton'
    14:47:53 And I scroll to 'RiskCalculationButton'
    14:47:53 And I click on 'RiskCalculationButton'
    14:47:53 And I switch to iframe 'RiskCalculationIframe'
    14:47:54 And I click on 'RiskCalculationEditButton'
    14:47:55 And Verify IG 'RISK_CALC_REGION_ig' row '17 - Marine Sum Insured' Local/Amount can be filled
    14:48:07 And I set SECOND IG 'RISK_CALC_REGION_ig' from first row '17 - Marine Sum Insured' to random numbers between '1' and '50' for all enabled cells excluding DDL
    14:48:12 And I wait for '5' sec
    14:48:12 And I switch back to main content
    14:48:12 And I scroll to top of page
    14:48:12 And I click on 'NextButton'

    14:48:57 And I wait for '5' sec

    14:53:05 Then I click on 'UserDDL'

    15:00:22 And Set 'QuotationNumberSearch' value to 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    15:00:22 And I press Enter on 'QuotationNumberSearch'
    15:00:27 And I wait for '5' sec
    15:00:29 And I reload page
    15:00:31 And I click on 'EditQuotationImg'
    15:00:36 And I wait for '5' sec
    15:00:36 And Verify text of 'StatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '4 - Cancelled'
    15:00:36 And Verify text of 'ValidityStatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '2 - Invalid'
    15:00:36 And Verify text of 'QutQuotNoAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    15:00:44 And I wait for '7' sec
    15:00:44 Then I click on 'UserDDL'
    15:00:45 And I click on 'LogoutButton'
    15:00:45 And Verify 'loginButton' is present

    15:01:21 And Verify 'QutValidityStatusDisplay' equals '1 - Valid' text

    15:08:38 And Select 'Policy wise' value from 'ReiMethodCombobox' dropdown list
    15:08:38 And I switch back to main content
    15:08:38 And I click on 'CloseButtonFromPopup'
    15:08:39 And I scroll to 'DeleteButton'
    15:08:39 And I click on 'DeleteButton'
    15:08:39 And I click on 'DeleteButtonPopup'
    15:08:44 And I wait for '5' sec
    15:08:44 And Verify 'SuccessfullyAlert' contains 'Quotation Deleted Successfully!' text
    15:08:45 And Set 'SearchQuotationInput' value to '4 - Cancelled'
    15:08:45 And I press Enter on 'SearchQuotationInput'
    15:08:45 And I click on 'QuotationNumberTable'
    15:08:45 And Set 'QuotationNumberSearch' value to 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    15:08:45 And I press Enter on 'QuotationNumberSearch'
    15:08:50 And I wait for '5' sec
    15:08:52 And I reload page
    15:08:54 And I click on 'EditQuotationImg'
    15:09:01 And I wait for '7' sec
    15:09:01 And Verify text of 'StatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '4 - Cancelled'
    15:09:01 And Verify text of 'ValidityStatusAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value '2 - Invalid'
    15:09:01 And Verify text of 'QutQuotNoAllQuotationDetails' equals saved value 'statemanager:QuotationNo'
    15:09:08 And I wait for '7' sec
    15:09:09 Then I click on 'UserDDL'
    15:09:09 And I click on 'LogoutButton'
    15:09:09 And Verify 'loginButton' is present
